'''fathoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:availment|availment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:availment|availment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fathoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætheteth|fætheteth]] || [[word:fæthetej|fæthetej]] || [[word:fæthetesh|fæthetesh]] || [[word:fæthete|fæthete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathothototh|fathothototh]] || [[word:fathothotoj|fathothotoj]] || [[word:fathothotosh|fathothotosh]] || [[word:fathothoto|fathothoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathototh|fathototh]] || [[word:fathotoj|fathotoj]] || [[word:fathotosh|fathotosh]] || [[word:fathoto|fathoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathoftofth|fathoftofth]] || [[word:fathoftofj|fathoftofj]] || [[word:fathoftofsh|fathoftofsh]] || [[word:fathoftof|fathoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathototho|fathototho]] || [[word:fathotojo|fathotojo]] || [[word:fathotosho|fathotosho]] || [[word:fathotoko|fathotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathototh|fathototh]] || [[word:fathotoj|fathotoj]] || [[word:fathotosh|fathotosh]] || [[word:fathoto|fathoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathotothol|fathotothol]] || [[word:fathotojol|fathotojol]] || [[word:fathotoshol|fathotoshol]] || [[word:fathotokol|fathotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathotoothotho|fathotoothotho]] || [[word:fathotoojojo|fathotoojojo]] || [[word:fathotooshosho|fathotooshosho]] || [[word:fathotooko|fathotooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathotothon|fathotothon]] || [[word:fathotojon|fathotojon]] || [[word:fathotoshon|fathotoshon]] || [[word:fathotokon|fathotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathotothooro|fathotothooro]] || [[word:fathotojooro|fathotojooro]] || [[word:fathotoshooro|fathotoshooro]] || [[word:fathotokooro|fathotokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
